verses.text: Tua laitakin leitung buppi in kampau khat leh kammal tawmno bek nei hi
Amaute, nisuahna lamah lal uh a, Shinar gam sungah zanglei mun khat mu-in tua lai-ah a teng uh hi
Amaute khatlekhat kiangah, “Hong pai un, leiseek seekin limtakin hal ni,” kici uh hi. Amaute in suang dingin leiseek nei uh a, a buan dingin kultal tui nei uh hi

Tua ciangin amaute in, “Hong pai un, leitung buppi-ah eite i kithehthang gawp lohna dingin ei-a' dingin khuapi khat bawlin, a dawn in vantung a ban ding tausang khat lamin, eite' minthan'na ding khat bawl ni,” ci uh hi
Tua ciangin mihingte' lamsa khuapi leh tausangpi a en dingin Topa hong paisuk hi

Topa in, “En un, amaute minam khat hi uh a, amaute khempeuh in kampau khat nei uh hi. Hih pen amau' sep ding a kipatna bek ahi hi. Tu-in sep dinga amau' vaihawmte amau-a' dingin hi thei nawnlo ding hi
Hong pai un, amaute khatlekhat' thugen a kitheih lohna dingun eite paisukin amau' kampau va kitukalhsak ni,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa in tua lai panin leitung khempeuhah amaute thehthang a, a khuapi bawl uh a tawp uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin a min Babel kici hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in tua munah leitung khempeuh' kampau kitukalhsak hi. Tua lai mun panin Topa in leitung khempeuhah amaute a thehthang hi.
Hihte pen Shem' suanlekhakte ahi hi. Shem kum za khat a phak, tuiciin tun' khit kum nih ciangin, amah in Arpakshad kici tapa khat nei hi
Arpakshad a suah khit ciangin Shem kum za khat nungta lai a, tanu leh tapa dang nei lai hi
Arpakshad kum sawmthumlenga a phak khit ciangin, amah in Shelah kici tapa khat nei hi
Shelah a suah khit ciangin Arpakshad kum za li leh kum sawmthum nungta lai a, tanu leh tapa dang nei lai hi
Shelah kum sawmthum a phak khit ciangin Eber kici tapa khat nei hi
Eber' suah khit ciangin Shelah kum za li leh kum sawmthum nungta lai a, tanu leh tapa dang nei lai hi
Eber kum sawmthumleli a phak khit ciangin amah in Peleg kici tapa khat nei hi
Peleg a suah khit ciangin Eber kum za li leh kum sawmthum nungta lai a, tanu leh tapa dang nei lai hi
Peleg kum sawmthum a phak khit ciangin amah in Reu kici tapa khat nei hi
Reu a suah khit ciangin Peleg kum za nih leh kum kua nungta lai a, tanu leh tapa dang nei lai hi
Reu kum sawmthumlenih a phak khit ciangin amah in Serug kici tapa khat nei hi
Serug a suah khit ciangin Reu kum za nih leh kum sagih nungta nungta lai a, tanu leh tapa dang nei lai hi
Serug kum sawmthum a phak khit ciangin amah in Nahor kici tapa khat nei hi
Nahor a suah khit ciangin Serug kum za nih nungta lai a, tanu leh tapa dang nei lai hi
Nahor kum sawmnihlekua a phak khit ciangin amah in Terah kici tapa khat nei hi
Terah a suah khit ciangin Nahor kum za leh sawmlekua nungta lai a, tanu leh tapa dang neilai hi
Terah kum sawmsagih a phak khit ciangin amah in Abram, Nahor, leh Haran a nei hi.
Tu-in Terah' suanlekhakte hih bang ahi hi. Terah pen Abram, Nahor, leh Haran' pa hi a, Haran pen Lot' pa ahi hi
Ama pa Terah a sih ma-in ama suahna gam ahi, Khaldea gam Ur khua-ah Haran si hi
Abram leh Nahor in zi nei uh hi. Abram' zi min Sarai hi a, Nahor' zi min Milkah hi a, Milkah pen Iskah' pa Haran' tanu ahi hi
Tu-in Sarai ciing a, ta neilo hi

Terah in ama tapa Abram leh Haran' tapa, ama tupa ahi Lot, leh a tapa Abram' zi ahi a monu Sarai samin, Kanaan gam sungah a pai dingin Khaldea gam Ur khua panin amaute a paikhia khawm uh hi. Ahi zongin amaute Haran a tun' uh ciangin tua munah a teng uh hi
Terah' khan'sung kum za nih leh kum nga hi a, Haran-ah Terah a si hi.
